rate_limit.reached: You have reached the limit of {0} messages over {1} seconds
rate_limit.summary_reached: You have reached the limit of {0} summary digests over {1} seconds. Quests in this period will not be delivered until the window resets — consider using a less frequent {2}summary schedule or trimming your tracked rewards.
msg.settime.err_end_before_start: end time must be after start time (cross-midnight not supported)
msg.settime.err_step_out_of_range: step must be between 1 and 23 hours
rate_limit.banned_soft: You have breached the rate limit too many times in the last 24 hours. Your messages are now stopped, use {0}start to resume
rate_limit.banned_hard: You have breached the rate limit too many times in the last 24 hours. Your messages are now stopped, contact an administrator to resume
rate_limit.shame: <@{0}> has had their Poracle tracking disabled for exceeding the rate limit too many times!
delivery.fail.shame: <@{0}> has been disabled because Poracle messages keep failing to deliver to them.

tracking.weight_fmt: weight: {0}-{1}g ⚠️ legacy filter — weight is no longer reliable; use untrack id:N to remove this rule
tracking.bulk_changes: I have made a lot of changes. See {0}{1} for details
tracking.warn_stopped: Your alerts are currently paused. Use {0}start to resume them.
tracking.warn_no_location: You are tracking by distance but have no location set. Use {0}location to set one.
tracking.warn_no_area: You are tracking by area but have no areas set. Use {0}area to add some.
tracking.warn_max_distance: Distance has been capped to the maximum of {0}m.
tracking.warn_template_not_found: Template "{0}" not found for type {1}/{2}. Tracking saved but alerts may not render.
tracking.id_hint: To remove a specific entry, use its id — e.g. `{0}untrack id:45` or `{0}raid remove id:12`
tracking.id_hint_slash: To remove a specific entry, run `/untrack <type>` (e.g. `/untrack raid`) and pick it from the list.

slash.opt.quest.summary.desc: Buffer matches and dispatch in a scheduled batch instead of alerting immediately

msg.help.text:
**Available commands:**
{0}track <pokemon> [iv:N] [cp:N] [level:N] [d:N] — Track pokemon
{0}untrack <pokemon> — Remove pokemon tracking
{0}raid <pokemon|level:N|legendary> [d:N] — Track raids
{0}egg <level:N|legendary|mega> [d:N] — Track eggs
{0}quest <pokemon|stardust|energy:pokemon|candy:pokemon> — Track quests
{0}invasion [everything|<type>] — Track invasions
{0}lure <type|everything> — Track lures
{0}gym <team|everything> [slot_changes] — Track gyms
{0}nest <pokemon|everything> — Track nests
{0}maxbattle <pokemon|level:N> — Track max battles
{0}fort <pokestop|gym|everything> — Track fort updates
{0}tracked — Show all tracking
{0}script — Export tracking as commands
{0}area [list|add|remove] — Manage areas
{0}location <lat,lon> — Set location
{0}profile [list|add|remove|switch] — Manage profiles
{0}language <code> — Set language
{0}start / {0}stop — Enable/disable alerts
{0}version — Show version
cmd.poracle_admin.desc: Administrative operations (reload, status, maintenance, emoji, reconciliation)
cmd.poracle_admin.not_admin: This command is reserved for administrators.
cmd.poracle_admin.unknown_group: Unknown subgroup. Try `!poracle-admin` for the list.
cmd.poracle_admin.unknown_sub: Unknown subcommand for `{0}`. Try `!poracle-admin {0}` to see what's available.
cmd.poracle_admin.help.admin_only: This command is reserved for server administrators. Each subgroup performs a live operations task.
cmd.poracle_admin.help_intro:
🛠️ Poracle Admin

Live operations subgroups (administrators only):
cmd.poracle_admin.group.reload.desc: reload DTS, geofence, or in-memory state
cmd.poracle_admin.group.emoji.desc: list, reload, or test emoji config
cmd.poracle_admin.group.ratelimit.desc: inspect and reset alert-bucket rate limits
cmd.poracle_admin.group.summary.desc: summary buffer inspection and forced dispatch
cmd.poracle_admin.slash.help_stub: (no commands available yet — coming in a later task)
cmd.poracle_admin.reload.help.intro: Reload runtime state from disk or database.
cmd.poracle_admin.reload.dts.desc: `dts` — reload DTS templates and partials from disk
cmd.poracle_admin.reload.geofence.desc: `geofence` — reload geofence files and refresh state
cmd.poracle_admin.reload.state.desc: `state` — reload tracking rules and humans from MySQL (bypasses debounce)
cmd.poracle_admin.reload.geofence.succes: ✅ Geofence reloaded in {0}ms ({1} fences, {2} tracking rules)
cmd.poracle_admin.reload.state.success: ✅ State reloaded in {0}ms ({1} tracking rules, {2} active humans)
cmd.poracle_admin.emoji.help_stub: (no commands available yet — coming in a later task)
cmd.poracle_admin.reconcile.help_stub: (no commands available yet — coming in a later task)
cmd.poracle_admin.cache.help_stub: (no commands available yet — coming in a later task)
cmd.poracle_admin.ratelimit.help_stub: (no commands available yet — coming in a later task)
cmd.poracle_admin.summary.help_stub: (no commands available yet — coming in a later task)
cmd.poracle_admin.status.help_stub: (no commands available yet — coming in a later task)
cmd.poracle_admin.maintenance.help_stub: (no commands available yet — coming in a later task)
cmd.poracle_admin.status.help.intro: !poracle-admin status — current health snapshot. Add -v for verbose mode (per-route Discord detail, full webhook per-type breakdown).
cmd.poracle_admin.status.paused_banner:
🔴 PAUSED — {0} (since {1} ago)
   Outbound delivery is held. Webhooks still ingest and queue.
cmd.poracle_admin.status.label.mysql_poo: Connections: {0}/{1} open ({2} in use, {3} idle, waits={4})
